kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-NEG-05 Invalid Account ID via API

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=<requests.auth.HTTPBasicAuth object at 0x0000020AC3ADD400>, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/000000 path_url=/parabank/services/bank/accounts/000000 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Basic am9objpkZW1v'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/000000 status=400, reason=Bad Request headers={'Date': 'Mon, 22 Jun 2026 18:15:53 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=UTF-8', 'Content-Length': '25', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only': "script-src 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; report-uri https://csp-reporting.cloudflare.com/cdn-cgi/script_monitor/report?m=Q8NSN2nLwDT5ySp8oE1_cjtlXupX2jEvNZMYL5w4bkI-1782152153.3393404-1.0.1.1-5hvCXyUsgQXYLOothkZKppwL4ci_1YRjGrh.AUrlkO1bVu.RWCpLdwKIgBHSma1IEcN_w7.PqJBQOyUBuaePzJCYVnidFi0ruMdNKLJAiNeb9Gfn4R4ZWb3UzhFAEPKVFgW2MSQPKi1DZSgRSil6rlLEmXgbyqX_vetKs61yHvwpUuJLwQamQywUrR6BNtUJ; report-to cf-csp-endpoint", 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Report-To': '{"group":"cf-csp-endpoint","max_age":86400,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://csp-reporting.cloudflare.com/cdn-cgi/script_monitor/report?m=Q8NSN2nLwDT5ySp8oE1_cjtlXupX2jEvNZMYL5w4bkI-1782152153.3393404-1.0.1.1-5hvCXyUsgQXYLOothkZKppwL4ci_1YRjGrh.AUrlkO1bVu.RWCpLdwKIgBHSma1IEcN_w7.PqJBQOyUBuaePzJCYVnidFi0ruMdNKLJAiNeb9Gfn4R4ZWb3UzhFAEPKVFgW2MSQPKi1DZSgRSil6rlLEmXgbyqX_vetKs61yHvwpUuJLwQamQywUrR6BNtUJ"}]}', 'CF-RAY': 'a0fd3dae5bf9a6d1-DEL'} body=Could not find account #0

C:\Users\mridu\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'parabank.parasoft.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are equal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Call GET /accounts/000000 with a fake account ID — expect a 4xx response
